min_lot_size_sqft.field_value_text: Minimum lot area: 1 acre for residential development in the RA (Rural Areas) district.
min_lot_size_sqft.reasoning: Synthetic value — Frederick County VA has large lot minimums in the rural areas district.

height_limit_ft.field_value_text: Maximum building height: 35 feet in the RA district.
height_limit_ft.reasoning: Synthetic value — Frederick County has restrictive height limits.

density_limit_units_per_acre.field_value_text: Maximum residential density: 4 dwelling units per acre.
density_limit_units_per_acre.reasoning: Synthetic value — Frederick County has low density limits.

parking_min_spaces_per_unit.field_value_text: Minimum off-street parking: 2 spaces per dwelling unit.
parking_min_spaces_per_unit.reasoning: Synthetic value — Frederick County requires standard suburban parking minimums.
